properties.label: Number of Circles
properties.description: Sets the number of circles drawn on the model. In radial mode, controls the number of color rings.

properties.label: Size
properties.description: Controls the radius of each circle. In radial mode, this sets the thickness of the concentric rings.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: Controls how fast the circles move across the model. In radial mode, controls the speed of the outward ring expansion.

properties.label: Bounce
properties.description: When enabled, circles bounce off the edges of the model instead of wrapping around to the opposite side.

properties.label: Radial
properties.description: Draws expanding concentric rings radiating outward from the center point, using palette colors in alternating bands.

properties.label: Plasma
properties.description: Uses a metaball algorithm where overlapping circle influence fields blend together, creating smooth organic plasma-like shapes.

properties.label: Radial 3D
properties.description: Draws expanding concentric rings with a continuously cycling rainbow hue based on distance from center, creating a 3D-like depth effect.

properties.label: Bubbles
properties.description: Draws hollow circle outlines instead of filled circles, and launches them upward at slightly random angles to simulate rising bubbles.

properties.label: Linear Fade
properties.description: Makes each circle fade from full brightness at the center to dark at the edge, creating a soft glow effect instead of a solid fill.

properties.label: X Center
properties.description: Shifts the center point of radial rings horizontally. Only active when Radial or Radial 3D is enabled.

properties.label: Y Center
properties.description: Shifts the center point of radial rings vertically. Only active when Radial or Radial 3D is enabled.
